title: Chat Trigger not receiving messages from webhook
symptom: The Chat Trigger node does not receive any messages when called from a JS script, despite working fine within n8n's interface.
not_this_if: Chat Trigger works when using the internal chat interface
root_cause: The Chat Trigger node requires specific settings to be enabled for it to receive external calls. If the trigger is not made publicly available or the workflow is not activated, it will not respond to incoming requests.
fix_steps: Open the Chat Trigger node settings.
Toggle on the 'Make Chat Publicly Available' option.
If using Embedded Chat mode, verify that all setup steps from the guide are followed.
agent_instruction: Enable the 'Make Chat Publicly Available' option and activate the workflow.
